title: Lebanese Firefighters Respond to Aftermath of Israeli Airstrike as Footage Documents Latest Destruction
detail: Lebanese firefighters deployed to the scene of an Israeli airstrike on April 7, with footage documenting the scale of destruction from the latest wave of Israeli strikes on Lebanon. Al Jazeera broadcast video showing emergency responders working through rubble as Israeli aerial operations against Lebanon continued. The footage underscores the ongoing toll of Israeli bombardment campaigns extending beyond Gaza into Lebanese territory.

title: Palestinians Queue for Hours in Pouring Rain for Bread as Gaza Food Crisis Deepens
detail: Palestinians in Gaza lined up for hours in pouring rain to obtain bread on April 7, 2026, as food distribution across the territory remained critically constrained. Al Jazeera footage showed desperate crowds enduring harsh weather conditions in what aid agencies describe as a manufactured famine. With all land crossings shut for over 37 consecutive days, bakeries and aid distribution points have become focal points of acute desperation as humanitarian organizations warn of imminent mass starvation.
